mapper.sql: a.ASSET_ID AS assetId, a.ASSET_NAME AS assetName, a.BUSINESS_CATEGORY AS businessCategory, c.CODE_NAME AS businessCategoryName, a.MIME_TYPE AS mimeType, a.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, a.ASSET_URL AS assetUrl, a.ASSET_STATE AS assetState, a.USE_YN AS useYn, a.REJECTED_REASON AS rejectedReason, a.CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId, a.CREATE_USER_NAME AS createUserName, TO_CHAR(a.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createDate, TO_CHAR(a.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastModifiedDtime

where.if: AND ( a.ASSET_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' OR a.CREATE_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' OR a.CREATE_USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' )

choose.when: ORDER BY a.ASSET_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, a.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY a.BUSINESS_CATEGORY ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, a.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY a.ASSET_STATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, a.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY a.CREATE_USER_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, a.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY a.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST, a.CREATE_DATE DESC NULLS LAST

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPW_CMS_ASSET a LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE c ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'CMS00001' AND c.CODE = a.BUSINESS_CATEGORY AND c.USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPW_CMS_ASSET a LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE c ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'CMS00001' AND c.CODE = a.BUSINESS_CATEGORY AND c.USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT ASSET_STATE FROM SPW_CMS_ASSET WHERE ASSET_ID = #{assetId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT CREATE_USER_ID FROM SPW_CMS_ASSET WHERE ASSET_ID = #{assetId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT a.ASSET_ID AS assetId, a.ASSET_NAME AS assetName, a.BUSINESS_CATEGORY AS businessCategory, c.CODE_NAME AS businessCategoryName, a.MIME_TYPE AS mimeType, a.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, a.ASSET_PATH AS assetPath, a.ASSET_URL AS assetUrl, a.ASSET_DESC AS assetDesc, a.ASSET_STATE AS assetState, a.USE_YN AS useYn, a.REJECTED_REASON AS rejectedReason, a.CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId, a.CREATE_USER_NAME AS createUserName, a.LAST_MODIFIER_NAME AS lastModifierName, TO_CHAR(a.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createDate, TO_CHAR(a.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastModifiedDtime FROM SPW_CMS_ASSET a LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE c ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'CMS00001' AND c.CODE = a.BUSINESS_CATEGORY AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE a.ASSET_ID = #{assetId}
mapper.update: UPDATE SPW_CMS_ASSET SET USE_YN = #{useYn}, LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId}, LAST_MODIFIER_NAME = #{modifierName}, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ASSET_ID = #{assetId}
